nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 中华人民共和国
nodes.summary: 中华人民共和国是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联285种鸟类，包括青头潜鸭、花脸鸭、黄腹角雉等285种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 纹胸啄木鸟
nodes.summary: 纹胸啄木鸟（学名：Dendrocopos atratus）为啄木鸟科啄木鸟属的鸟类。在中国大陆，分布于云南等地。该物种的模式产地在缅甸。 参考文献

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Its range extends from northeastern India to Vietnam and the province of Yunnan in southwestern China. It is a fairly uncommon species, but the population appears to be stable, and the International Union for Conservation of Nature has assessed its conservation status as being of "least concern". The stripe-breasted woodpecker is mainly found in montane evergreen forest, particularly pine and oak forest, but also the edges of deciduous forests, as well as more open areas with scattered trees
